assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 9-13 show the JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 29-31: "TC-8022's summary contains `(rhtpa-2.1)`, which matches the current issue's stream suffix `[rhtpa-2.1]`." and "Match confirmed: TC-8022 is a preemptive remediation task for this exact CVE and stream."

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 42-49 show: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend"). Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 25: "Link created | TC-8021 -> TC-8022 with link type 'Depend'".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 54-61 show jira.edit_issue(TC-8022) with labels updated to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] — 'security-preemptive' removed. triage-outcome.md lines 29-33 confirm the before/after state: Labels changed from "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive" to "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123".

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 82: "Step 7 will **skip** task creation for this stream because the preemptive task has been reconciled and is now linked as a standard remediation task." triage-outcome.md line 27: "Step 7 skip | No new remediation tasks created for stream 2.1.x". triage-outcome.md line 43: "No new Jira tasks were created because TC-8022 already covers the required remediation work."
